tagline: Buffalo's Premier Swimming Pool Service & Maintenance Provider

hero.headline: Your Pool Deserves Buffalo's Best Care
hero.subheadline: Matt and the 716 Pool Service crew handle your openings, closings, and weekly maintenance so you never worry about water chemistry or debris again. Just grab your towel and dive in.

services.label: Our Pool Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care for<br class="hidden md:block"> Western New York Homeowners
services.subtitle: From spring openings to winter closings and everything in between, 716 Pool Service keeps your backyard oasis sparkling all season long.

cards.title: Pool Openings
cards.description: Get swim-ready fast. We inspect equipment, balance water chemistry, and start up your system so your pool is perfect for the first warm day.

cards.title: Pool Closings
cards.description: Protect your investment from harsh WNY winters. Thorough winterization that prevents freeze damage and makes spring opening a breeze.

cards.title: Weekly Maintenance
cards.description: Skimming, vacuuming, chemical balancing, and equipment checks every week. Your pool stays crystal clear without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Deep cleaning with professional-grade trash pumps to remove accumulated dirt, debris, and leaves. We restore pools to pristine condition fast.

cards.title: Equipment & Repairs
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, and more. Matt personally diagnoses issues and gets your equipment running right, often in a single visit.

cards.title: General Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive ongoing care for all pool types. Filter cleaning, water testing, and preventive maintenance to avoid costly surprises.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Call or text us at 716-464-2912. We'll ask a few questions about your pool and schedule a convenient time to come out. No pressure, no sales pitch.

steps.title: We Get to Work
steps.description: Matt and the crew arrive on time with professional-grade equipment. We handle everything — cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks — so you don't have to.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays sparkling clean and swim-ready all season. If anything isn't right, we come back and fix it. That's the 716 Pool Service promise.

about.label: Why WNY Homeowners Trust Us
about.headline: Not Just a Pool Guy — Your Dedicated Pool Care Team
about.description: Founded in 2021 by Matt right here in Clarence, 716 Pool Service has quickly earned a reputation as Buffalo's most trusted pool care provider. With over a decade of combined experience and a perfect 5.0 Google rating from 64 reviews, we treat every pool like it's our own. Our hands-on, owner-operated approach means you always know who's caring for your backyard.

features.title: Owner on Every Job
features.description: Matt personally oversees your pool care and addresses equipment issues himself. You're never handed off to a random subcontractor.

features.title: No Contracts. Ever.
features.description: We earn your trust every single visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees. Stay because you want to, not because you have to.

features.title: 5-Star Guaranteed Results
features.description: 64 reviews and a perfect 5.0 rating don't happen by accident. If you're not thrilled with our work, we'll come back and make it right — free.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different. Tell us about yours and we'll give you an honest quote — no hidden fees, no upsells, no contracts.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right at no extra charge. We've maintained a perfect 5.0 Google rating because we don't cut corners and we don't stop until your pool is pristine. Your satisfaction isn't just a goal — it's our standard.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within the same week. For urgent pool issues, call us at 716-464-2912 and we'll do our best to get there fast. We know WNY's short swim season means every day counts.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our clients give us gate access and go about their day. After each visit, we'll make sure you know exactly what was done so you have complete peace of mind.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in Western New York?
faqs.answer: We serve Clarence, Buffalo, and the greater Western New York area. If you're in the WNY region, give us a call — chances are we're already servicing pools in your neighborhood.

faqs.question: Do you require a long-term contract?
faqs.answer: Never. We don't do contracts, period. You can cancel anytime with zero fees or penalties. We believe in earning your business every single visit, and our 64 five-star reviews prove that approach works.

faqs.question: What types of pools do you service?
faqs.answer: We service all types of swimming pools — in-ground, above-ground, vinyl, fiberglass, and concrete. Whether it's a weekly cleaning or a seasonal opening, we've got the equipment and expertise for your pool.

testimonials.name: Jennifer J.
testimonials.text: Communication was excellent, they were responsive, professional, and easy to work with throughout the entire process. The owner personally addressed equipment issues, demonstrating exceptional customer service.

testimonials.name: John W.
testimonials.text: Matt and the team at 716 Pool Service are excellent. We used their service for a spring cleaning and the pool is spotless. Work that typically required a full weekend was completed quickly.

testimonials.name: Christopher B.
testimonials.text: Excellent communication prior to appointment, very professional, knowledgeable about all aspects of pool service. A three-person crew delivered outstanding results. I would recommend them to other pool owners.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure quote from Buffalo's top-rated pool service. No contracts, no commitments — just honest pricing and five-star care.
benefits: Free pool assessment with every quote
